小技巧，如何在 GitHub Copilot 的 Agent 中避免老是确认权限，类似于 claude --dangerously-skip-permissions

在 Settings -> Claude Agent: Allow Dangerously Skip Permissions 中勾选 Allow bypass permissions mode. Recommended only for sandboxes with no internet access. https://t.co/iJSdWvH9h9
